meta_title: For Founders: analytics setup to Solve no coding experience (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Analytics Setup Without Coding (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Master analytics for your SaaS without writing code. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to implement high-conversion tracking for your AI-built MVP.
content.answer_block: Stop flying blind. You don't need a CS degree to master your data. By leveraging Antigravity for automated event mapping and Claude Code for infrastructure orchestration, you can deploy enterprise-grade analytics in minutes, turning raw user behavior into actionable revenue signals without touching a single line of manual code.
content.intro:
You have a vision, a product, and the relentless drive to ship, but you’re hitting a wall: the black box of user behavior. Without data, you aren't building a business; you're gambling on features. The silence from your dashboard isn't just a lack of vanity metrics—it's the sound of lost revenue and missed optimization loops that kill startups before they hit scale.

But the era of hiring a data engineer to track a simple button click is over. We’re entering the age of the AI Builder, where infrastructure is code, and code is a dialogue. By combining the automation of Antigravity with the reasoning power of Claude Code, you can architect a high-fidelity analytics stack that reveals exactly where your users drop off, convert, or churn—all without writing a traditional script.

steps.title: Define Your North Star Metrics
steps.description: Before deploying, identify the three events that correlate with revenue. We focus on 'Sign-up', 'Feature-Activation', and 'Upgrade-Intent'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a SaaS analytics tracking plan focusing on high-intent user events including signup, onboarding completion, and subscription upgrades.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a JSON schema for segment-compatible event tracking based on my product requirements file'

steps.title: Injecting the Analytics Layer
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject your tracking SDK into the core application shell without disrupting existing business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a modular snippet for initializing a tracking provider that handles event batching and error suppression for a React-based SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/App.tsx 'inject the tracking initialization provider at the root level and wrap the main router'

steps.title: Automating Event Hooking
steps.description: Map user interactions to your schema. We automate the event emission so every button click is captured as a structured data point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a high-order function that wraps UI components to automatically fire analytics events on click without polluting the component logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scan components folder and apply analytics wrapper to all PrimaryButton components'

steps.title: Implementing Session Replay Logic
steps.description: Session replays are the ultimate debug tool. We configure privacy filters to ensure PII is masked before data hits your dashboard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a data-masking middleware for session replays that automatically scrubs sensitive user inputs like emails and passwords.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/utils/masking.ts 'implement a regex-based filter to sanitize all form input before session recording'

steps.title: Verification and Health Monitoring
steps.description: Use automated tests to ensure tracking hasn't broken. If a tracking event fails, the build pipeline should alert you immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a health-check script that validates the presence of event tags on critical conversion routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a test suite to verify that clicking the Upgrade button triggers the trackUpgrade event'

pro_tips: Always track the 'Time-to-First-Value' as your primary metric; it is the single greatest predictor of SaaS retention.
Use server-side event forwarding to bypass ad-blockers and ensure your data integrity remains above 95%.
Never track everything; focus on 'Actionable Events' that lead to revenue, or you will drown in noise.
Implement a 'Data Contract' early on so your analytics schema doesn't drift as you rapidly iterate your MVP.
Set up automated Slack alerts for when your core conversion events drop below a historical 7-day moving average.
content.next_steps: Now that your analytics pipeline is live, set up a 14-day observation window to identify your 'Aha!' moment and double down on the features that drive the highest user engagement.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the framework to move from guessing to knowing. Stop building in the dark and start optimizing for growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
